headline: Devon Energy Schedules First-Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
summary: OKLAHOMA CITY, April 08, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Devon Energy Corp. (NYSE: DVN) today announced it will report first-quarter 2026 results on Tuesday, May 5, after the close of U.S. financial markets. The earnings release and presentation for the first-quarter 2026 results will be available on the company’s website at www.devonenergy.com. On Wednesday, May 6, the company will hold a conference call at 10 a.m. CDT (11 a.m. EDT), which will consist primarily of answers to questions from analysts a

headline: Energy Stocks Just Had Their Worst Day In A Year — 20 Stocks Hit By Trump's Ceasefire
summary: XLE falls 4.7% and XOP drops 6.3%—worst sessions since April 2025—as WTI crashes 18% on Trump's Iran ceasefire. APA leads XLE losses at −13.3%.

headline: Shares of oil and gas companies are trading lower after President Trump posted on social media that the U.S. will work closely with Iran and that many of the 15 points in the proposed plan to end the war have been agreed to, signaling a de-escalation in the Middle East conflict and related supply chain constraints.
